nasb.text: But you say, ‘Whoever says to his father or mother, “Whatever I have that would help you has been given to God,”

esv.text: But you say, ‘If anyone tells his father or his mother, “What you would have gained from me is given to God,”

cnv.text: 你們卻說：‘人若對父母說：“我應該給你們的，已經作了獻給　神的禮物”，

ccb.text: 你们却说，‘人如果把供养父母的钱奉献给上帝，

csbs.text: 你们却说‘如果有人对父亲或母亲说：我本该给你的已经做了圣殿奉献，
